basic_details.job_title: SVBPH Delhi Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi (SVBPH Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi (SVBPH Delhi) has published the Senior Resident Notification 2026 on 18 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Senior Resident position. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 45 years and holding MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/ DNB/ Diploma as per residency scheme in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/ Institution are eligible to attend the walk-in interview at the official venue. The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22 May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and recruitment details below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Persons with disabilities shall be given relaxation as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/ DNB/ Diploma as per residency scheme in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/ Institution
qualification.details: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/ DNB/ Diploma as per residency scheme in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/ Institution.

salary_details.details: Basic of Rs. 67700/- in pay Matrix 11 of 7th CPC with other allowances as admissible per month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the SVBPH Delhi recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel Hospital Delhi recruitment is Senior Resident (Surgery).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident (Surgery) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Resident (Surgery) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 22nd May 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident (Surgery) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma in the concerned specialty from a recognized University/Institution.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Senior Resident (Surgery) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident (Surgery) post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident (Surgery) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 67700 Per Month, based on the basic pay of Rs. 67700/- in Pay Matrix 11 of the 7th CPC, along with admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident (Surgery) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article.
